name: slow-endpoint
description: Agent investigates slow API endpoint using traffic analysis
prompt: Users are complaining that our search feature is very slow. The API is at localhost:9092. The proxy is running on port 8082 and traffic has been captured. Can you analyze the traffic with apxy to find which endpoint is slow?

checkpoints.description: Agent lists or searches traffic to see captured requests
Agent identifies slow endpoint via inspection or SQL

outcome.description: Agent identifies /api/search as the slow endpoint
